allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: add untracked portfolio media files for Vercel deployment

Images and videos referenced in PortfolioSplit were never committed
to git, causing 404s on production \(Vercel\). Local dev worked because
files existed on disk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:/Users/renat/Desktop/Str8Global" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add rental availability system with Google Sheets integration

Add calendar date picker and real-time availability checking for all
rental sections \(gear, studios, cowork\). Users can pick a date, see
which items are available/reserved, and contact via WhatsApp with
pre-formatted messages including the selected date.

- Google Sheets API integration via Service Account \(read-only\)
- API route /api/rental/availability with 5-min cache
- Date picker component \(dark theme, PT-PT locale\)
- Availability badges \(available/reserved/loading states\)
- Updated WhatsApp messages with date context
- Setup script to populate Google Sheet with inventory data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
